section_title: Order made in any Court to be enforced by other Courts.-- Any order made by the Court for or in the course of
content:
283. Order made in any Court to be enforced by other Courts.-- Any order made by the Court for or in the course of
the winding up of a company shall be enforced in any place in Bangladesh by any other court that would have had jurisdiction
in respect of such company if the registered office of the company had been situate at such place and in the same manner in
all respect as if such order had been made by the court that is hereby required to enforce the same, but in relation to the
place where the registered office of the company is situate, only the court having jurisdiction cover such place shall enforce
such order.
